_comment: Rail MODEM_VCC do Eagle_tracker (extraido do Altium via MCP em 2026-07-20). Pour Int2 bbox (176.6,2130)-(1250.4,2806) mils -> retangulo 27.27x17.17 mm (aprox. bbox, pour real e poligonal). GND solido no Int1, core 48.4252 mil = 1.2316 mm, eps_r 4.2 do stackup real; tan_d 0.02 assumido (FR-4). Portas no referencial local do pour (origem no canto SW): 1=modem mPCIe pads 39/41 VBAT, 2=C39 (22uF), 3=U10 saida do load switch, 4=posicao PROPOSTA de decap junto aos pinos do modem. Pads mPCIe 2/52 (VBAT secundarios) nao modelados nesta rodada.
